panels.description: Completion requests, avg context size, and completion rate per language

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN file_extension = '' THEN '(unknown)' ELSE file_extension END AS 'Language',
  COUNT(*) AS 'Requests',
  ROUND(AVG(completions_count), 2) AS 'Avg Completions',
  ROUND(AVG(left_context_length)) AS 'Avg Left Context',
  ROUND(AVG(right_context_length)) AS 'Avg Right Context',
  ROUND(AVG(left_context_length + right_context_length)) AS 'Avg Total Context',
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS 'Users'
FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY file_extension
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

panels.title: Language Completion Profile

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  CASE WHEN file_extension = '' THEN '(unknown)' ELSE file_extension END AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), file_extension
ORDER BY time

panels.description: Which file types are most active during chat sessions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN active_file_extension = '' OR active_file_extension IS NULL THEN '(no file)' ELSE active_file_extension END AS 'File Type',
  COUNT(*) AS 'Chat Events'
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY active_file_extension
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Active File Types During Chat

panels.description: Context size trends for top languages

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE(timestamp) AS time,
  file_extension AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(left_context_length + right_context_length)) AS value
FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND file_extension IN (SELECT file_extension FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log GROUP BY file_extension ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5)
GROUP BY DATE(timestamp), file_extension
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Avg Context Size by Language (Top 5)
